name: stOrk
description:
'''stOrk''' was an American [[avant-garde metal]] [[Supergroup (music)|supergroup]], formed by ex-[[Korn]] touring guitarist [[Shane Gibson (musician)|Shane Gibson]] and drummer [[Thomas Lang]] in 2009. The band's debut album, ''[[stOrk (album)|stOrk]]'', was released on January 11, 2009, via MUSO Entertainment. Their second album, ''Broken Pieces'', was released in 2014.

On April 15, 2014, Shane Gibson died of a blood clotting disorder at the age of 35.
